stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct regarding the establishment of noise abatement procedures by the operator?

options.a: The operator must establish NADP 1 or NADP 2.
options.b: NADP 1 or NADP 2 must be chosen for an airport, either by the commander or by the operator.
options.c: The operator should establish its own NADPs by complying with the NADPs published by the authority.
options.d: The same procedure must be applied for all airports regardless of the airplane type.
